_comment: Project-level Claude Code settings. SessionStart hook auto-recalls Hindsight context per .ai-playbook/specs/memory-hierarchy.md §4. PreToolUse hook enforces apply-skill orchestration per .ai-playbook/specs/apply-skill-enforcement.md. Matcher includes Bash (v0.20.0+) for heuristic detection of terminal-side writes to declared write_paths; set AIPLAYBOOK_BASH_INSPECTION=0 to disable that branch only.
